description_long: This coatrack features a minimalist, modern design with four upward-curving arms that serve as hooks for hanging coats, hats, or bags. The structure is composed of slender, dark wood or wood-like elements, joined at two circular bands—one near the top and one at mid-height—for stability and style. The legs splay outward at the base, providing a stable freestanding footprint. The finish is smooth and polished, giving the coatrack a sleek and contemporary appearance suitable for urban environments. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing function and clean lines. The overall form is tall and narrow, making it ideal for entryways, lobbies, or office spaces.
description: A tall, sleek coatrack with four upward-curving arms and a dark, polished wood finish, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of four arms and the central pole, with all hooks visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and outward splay of the legs, with the arms appearing more aligned.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the same symmetrical hook arrangement and central pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slim profile and outward splay of the legs.
